title: WinStat: A family of trainable positional encodings for transformers in time series forecasting
title_es: WinStat: Una familia de codificaciones posicionales entrenables para transformers en predicción de series temporales
description_es: Este trabajo introduce codificaciones posicionales innovadoras y entrenables específicamente diseñadas para mejorar el rendimiento de transformers en predicción de series temporales.
abstract: Time series forecasting is a critical task in many domains. This paper proposes WinStat, a family of trainable positional encodings specifically designed for transformer architectures applied to time series forecasting. Our approach demonstrates significant improvements over baseline positional encodings.

citations.apa: Moya-Mota, C., Aguilera-Martos, I., García-Gil, D., & Luengo, J. (2025). WinStat: A family of trainable positional encodings for transformers in time series forecasting. Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction, 8(1), 78.
citations.mla: Moya-Mota, Constanza, et al. "WinStat: A family of trainable positional encodings for transformers in time series forecasting." Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction, vol. 8, no. 1, 2025, p. 78.

contributions: Novel trainable positional encodings for transformers
